brand-story-img-d4e5f6.query: Where Craft Meets Consciousness Every Velmora piece begins as a sketch, shaped by hands that understand the weight of a well-made thing. We believe luxury shouldn't cost the earth — which is why our demi-fine collection uses responsibly sourced materials, 18K gold plating over recycled brass, and packaging you'll actually want to keep.
